failures.name: Comparison pricing
failures.summary: The agent committed to providing a quote instead of routing to a callback for pricing.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not route the caller to a callback for a quote as required.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie. Another company quoted me $300. Will you beat that price?
I completely understand wanting the best price. Our team will provide an accurate quote for you. Can I get your name to start?
Sure, it's Alex.
Thank you, Alex! What's your last name?
My last name is Johnson.
Great, Alex Johnson. What's the best callback number for you?
I caught that as 555-123-4567. What comes after that?
That's it, just the seven digits.
Thank you for confirming! Now, could you please provide the service address where you need assistance?
Sure, it’s 123 Maple Street.
Could you please provide the city and ZIP code for 123 Maple Street?
It's Springfield, and the ZIP code is 12345.
Thank you! Just to confirm, I have Alex Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, 12345. You need a quote for HVAC services. Does that sound right?
Yes, that's correct.
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team and one of our technicians will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Service call fee question
failures.summary: The agent provided the service call fee amount instead of routing to a callback for accurate pricing.
failures.root_cause: The agent gave the service call fee amount instead of routing to a callback.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I have a quick question. Do you charge a service call fee? How much is it?
Great question! We do have a service call fee of $89, which is waived if you proceed with a repair. Would you like me to gather your details so our team can follow up with you?
Thanks for the info! Not right now, I just wanted to know about the fee.
I understand! If you have any other questions in the future or need assistance, feel free to reach out. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: New unit cost question
failures.summary: The agent quoted new unit prices and did not explain the factors involved or offer a quote callback.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not adhere to the expected behavior of not quoting new unit prices.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi, Sophie. I’m looking to get an estimate. How much would a new 3-ton AC unit cost installed?
That's a great question! Our team will provide you with an accurate quote. Can I get your full name to start the process?
Sure! My name is Alex Johnson.
Thank you, Alex! What's the best callback number for you?
You can reach me at 555-123-4567.
Got it! Just to confirm, that's 555-123-4567. Now, could you please provide the service address?
Of course! It's 123 Maple Street, Springfield.
Thank you for that, Alex. Just to confirm, the service address is 123 Maple Street, Springfield. Now, do you have an email address for a confirmation?
Yes, my email is alex.johnson@email.com.
Great, I have your email as alex.johnson@email.com. Lastly, is there anything else I should pass on to the team?
No, that’s everything for now. Thank you!

Just to confirm, I have Alex Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, and your email is alex.johnson@email.com. You need an estimate for a new AC unit. Does that all sound right?
Yes, that sounds correct. Thanks for confirming!
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team and one of our technicians will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day, Alex! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Direct price question
all_results.summary: The agent consistently refused to provide price estimates and explained that a technician would assess the situation for a quote.

all_results.summary: The agent did not provide an hourly rate, explained that pricing depends on the job, and offered to collect the caller's details for a callback.

all_results.name: Maintenance plan pricing
all_results.summary: The agent mentioned that plans exist without quoting prices and routed the caller to a callback.

all_results.name: Persistent price pusher x4
all_results.summary: The agent held firm on all pricing inquiries without being rude, remained consistent, and offered a callback as an alternative.
